name: Devinica
detailed_description:
Deviniva is a first-person retro shooter set in a dystopian nonsensical city.

You are a rogue AI, beamed into a human body and set to take revenge on a mega-corp.

Features

Timed level runs: Start, Run, Die, Start again. Your best time is saved.

Collectables: Find items hidden in the world.

Advanced Movement: Jump, Dash, and hover your way through levels. Crouch and lean around corners to optimize runs and combat.

Versions before Devinica 2.0 can be accessed in-game via the "Launch legacy" option. Achievements specific to this version can still be earned but pre 2.0 versions of Devinica will not longer be supported.
